name: C-10 --section aibom --aibom-file emits a bundle including the AIBOM block per the architecture
command: printf '%s' '{"bomFormat":"CycloneDX","specVersion":"1.6","components":[]}' > a.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section aibom --emit p.json --aibom-file a.json --commit-sha abc123 --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z && grep -q 'CycloneDX' p.json && echo bundled 1>&2
